feed.title: Security Advisory for .NET packages hosted at the NuGet Gallery
feed.subtitle: Security Advisory for .NET packages hosted at the NuGet Gallery on GitHub

entry.title: [Magick.NET-Q8-x86] ImageMagick is vulnerable to heap buffer over-write on 32-bit systems in SFW decoder
entry.content:
An overflow on 32-bit systems can cause a crash in the SFW decoder when processing extremely large images.

References

  • https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick/security/advisories/GHSA-56jp-jfqg-f8f4
  • https://github.com/dlemstra/Magick.NET/releases/tag/14.10.4
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-56jp-jfqg-f8f4

entry.title: [Magick.NET-Q8-x64] ImageMagick is vulnerable to heap buffer over-write on 32-bit systems in SFW decoder
entry.content:
An overflow on 32-bit systems can cause a crash in the SFW decoder when processing extremely large images.

References

  • https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick/security/advisories/GHSA-56jp-jfqg-f8f4
  • https://github.com/dlemstra/Magick.NET/releases/tag/14.10.4
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-56jp-jfqg-f8f4

  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-56jp-jfqg-f8f4

entry.title: [Magick.NET-Q8-x86] ImageMagick is vulnerable to Heap Overflow when writing extremely large image profile in the PNG encoder
entry.content:
An extremely large image profile could result in a heap overflow when encoding a PNG image.

References

  • https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick/security/advisories/GHSA-qmw5-2p58-xvrc
  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-30883
  • https://github.com/dlemstra/Magick.NET/releases/tag/14.10.4
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qmw5-2p58-xvrc
